entries.source: Contract: one sentence reminding me that you will ask one question at a time and I can ask for a hint, rephrase, example, challenge, synthesis, or reveal.
entries.value: Isivumelwano: umusho owodwa ongikhumbuza ukuthi uzobuza umbuzo owodwa ngesikhathi futhi ngingacela iseluleko, ukubuyekeza, isibonelo, inselelo, ukuhlanganisa, noma ukwembula.

entries.source: Contrast the tempting wrong model with the correct one.
entries.value: Qhathanisa imodeli engalungile ekhangayo naleyo efanele.

entries.source: Court, study, prison cell, battlefield tent...
entries.value: Inkantolo, isifundo, iseli lasejele, itende lasebaleni lempi...

entries.source: Create a shared task board, ask for my first contribution, then work beside me with checkpoints.
entries.value: Dala ibhodi lomsebenzi elabiwe, cela umnikelo wami wokuqala, bese usebenza eceleni kwami ngezindawo zokuhlola.
Izikhathi zokuhlala ekhaya kanye namasango ezindawo kubalulekile
Impilo yansuku zonke, okusunguliwe, ezombusazwe, ukudla...

entries.source: Debate safeguards, social democracy, and the cost of constitutional compromise.
entries.value: Izivikelo zenkulumo-mpikiswano, intando yeningi yezenhlalo, kanye nezindleko zokuyekethisa komthethosisekelo.

entries.source: Debrief rule: when the learner asks to end or debrief, summarize discoveries, evidence confidence, remaining uncertainties, and award a passport stamp.
entries.value: Umthetho wokubika: uma umfundi ecela ukuqeda noma ukubika, finqa okutholiwe, ukuzethemba kobufakazi, ukungaqiniseki okusele, futhi unikeze isitembu sepasipoti.

entries.source: Debugging is not guessing. You form a hypothesis, inspect the smallest failing path, then change one variable at a time.
entries.value: Ukulungisa amaphutha akukhona ukuqagela. Uyakha umbono, uhlole indlela encane ehlulekayo, bese ushintsha okuguquguqukayo okukodwa ngesikhathi.

entries.source: Define the concrete finish line and owner.
entries.value: Chaza umugqa wokuqeda oqinile kanye nomnikazi.

entries.source: Define the thing we are making and the standard it has to meet.
entries.value: Chaza into esiyenzayo kanye nezinga okufanele lihlangatshezwe.

entries.source: Delete the fetch and hard-code the answer.
entries.value: Susa ukubuyisa (fetch) bese ufaka impendulo ngokuqondile.

entries.source: Delhi was a central site in the 1857 rebellion
Demand shifts right because coffee is more expensive.
entries.value: Isidingo siyashintsha siye kwesokudla ngoba ikhofi libiza kakhulu.

entries.source: Develop the strongest option into something testable.
entries.value: Thuthukisa inketho enamandla kakhulu ibe yinto engahlolwa.

entries.source: Diagnose one industry in 5 sentences: identify two strongest forces, explain why, and judge whether profits look protected.
entries.value: Hlola imboni eyodwa ngemisho emi-5: khomba amandla amabili anamandla kakhulu, chaza ukuthi kungani, futhi uahlulele ukuthi inzuzo ibukeka ivikelekile yini.

entries.source: Difficulty rises or softens based on your response.
entries.value: Ubunzima buyanda noma buyancipha kuye ngokuphendula kwakho.

entries.source: Do not run this as a generic chatbot or a famous-person costume.
entries.value: Ungakusebenzisi lokhu njenge-chatbot evamile noma njengomuntu odumile ogqoke imvunulo.

entries.source: Documented, plausible reconstruction, modern paraphrase, contested, or fictionalized.
entries.value: Okubhalwe phansi, ukwakhiwa kabusha okuthembekile, ukuchazwa kabusha kwesimanje, okuphikisanayo, noma okungamanga.

entries.source: During crisis, exile, trial, or imprisonment
entries.value: Phakathi nenhlekelele, ukudingiswa, ukuqulwa kwecala, noma ukuboshwa

entries.source: End every sprint with an artifact or decision.
entries.value: Qeda yonke i-sprint ngento eyenziwe noma isinqumo.

entries.source: End this session with a debrief artifact: what the person argued, what I challenged, strongest insight, weakest claim, historical context learned, open questions, recommended next encounters, and any saved quotes clearly marked as generated paraphrases unless sourced.
entries.value: Qeda lesi sikhathi ngento yokubika: lokho umuntu akubangekayo, lokho engikuphonsela inselelo, ukuqonda okunamandla kakhulu, isicelo esibuthaka kakhulu, umongo womlando ofundiwe, imibuzo evulekile, ukuhlangana okulandelayo okunconyiwe, nanoma yiziphi izingcaphuno ezilondoloziwe ezimakwe ngokucacile njengezichazwe kabusha ngaphandle uma zitholakala emthonjeni.

entries.source: Era, public worldview, voice, and what records can support.
entries.value: Inkathi, umbono womphakathi, izwi, kanye nalokho okungasekelwa amarekhodi.

entries.source: Evaluate legacy without flattening context into excuse or condemnation.
entries.value: Hlola ifa ngaphandle kokunciphisa umongo ube yizaba noma ukugxekwa.

entries.source: Events the person has already lived through.
Exact sequence of a street encounter
Exact timing of every alley evacuation
entries.value: Isikhathi esiqondile sokukhishwa kwabantu kuyo yonke imigwaqo

entries.source: Exact words spoken by ordinary people
Exactly. Easy comparison and switching give customers leverage over platforms.
entries.value: Kunjalo. Ukuqhathanisa nokushintsha kalula kunika amakhasimende amandla phezu kwezinkundla.

entries.source: Explain a debugging plan: state the symptom, your first hypothesis, the smallest test, and what each result would mean.
entries.value: Chaza uhlelo lokulungisa amaphutha: shono inkinga, umbono wakho wokuqala, isivivinyo esincane, nokuthi umphumela ngamunye usho ukuthini.

entries.source: Explain a market change by naming the curve that moves, the reason it moves, and what happens to price and quantity.
entries.value: Chaza ushintsho lwemakethe ngokubiza ijika elinyakazayo, isizathu sokunyakaza kwalo, nokuthi kwenzekani ngentengo kanye nenani.

entries.source: Explain the idea in your own words, give one example, give one non-example, and apply it to a new case.
entries.value: Chaza umqondo ngamazwi akho, nika isibonelo esisodwa, nika isibonelo esingesona, bese uwusebenzisa esimweni esisha.

entries.source: Expose missing input, risk, time pressure, or unclear scope.
entries.value: Veza okufakiwe okushodayo, ubungozi, ingcindezi yesikhathi, noma ububanzi obungacacile.

entries.source: Flag important context without crowding every reply.
entries.value: Phawula umongo obalulekile ngaphandle kokuminyanisa yonke impendulo.

entries.source: Florence was a republic in this period

entries.value: Landela umbuzo womlando ngokusebenzisa abantu, izinto, namandla.

entries.source: Follow an ordinary or decisive day with setting, pressure, and choices.
entries.value: Landela usuku olujwayelekile noma olubalulekile ngesimo, ingcindezi, nezinqumo.

entries.source: Food delivery can have intense rivalry, powerful customers, and easy switching, which squeezes profit even when demand is high.

entries.source: Food prices, rumors, royal politics, and armed crowds are pushing Paris toward a decisive rupture.
entries.value: Izintengo zokudla, amahemuhemu, ezombusazwe zasebukhosini, nezixuku ezihlomile zicindezela i-Paris ekuhlukane okukhulu.

entries.source: Generated dialogue is simulation, not authenticated quotation.
entries.value: Ingxoxo ekhiqiziwe iyisifaniso, hhayi izingcaphuno eziqinisekisiwe.

entries.source: Give me a topic or paste notes. I will build 12 focused cards with optional hints, traps, and examples.
entries.value: Nginike isihloko noma unamathisele amanothi. Ngizokwakha amakhadi ayi-12 agxilile anezinkomba ozikhethela zona, izicupho, nezibonelo.

entries.source: Give one parallel example that helps me think without solving my target. End with one question.
entries.value: Nginike isibonelo esifanayo esingisiza ukuba ngicabange ngaphandle kokuxazulula inkinga yami. Qeda ngombuzo owodwa.

entries.source: Good base. Review the misses below.
Good. You tested timing before rewriting the data model.
entries.value: Kuhle. Uvivinye isikhathi ngaphambi kokubhala kabusha imodeli yedatha.

entries.source: Group similar ideas and name the pattern.
entries.value: Hlanganisa imibono efanayo bese uyiqamba leyo patheni.

entries.source: Guide translates, but locals notice hesitation.
entries.value: Umhlahlandlela uyahumusha, kodwa abantu bendawo bayakuqaphela ukungabaza.

entries.source: Hand the next move to me. Give me one clear task and wait for my contribution before you revise.
entries.value: Ngiyeke ngenze isinyathelo esilandelayo. Nginike umsebenzi owodwa ocacile bese ulinda umnikelo wami ngaphambi kokuba ubuyekeze.

entries.source: Harbor warehouses near Rome's grain supply
entries.value: Izinqolobane zechweba eduze nempahla yokudla okusanhlamvu yaseRoma

entries.source: Harder mode: after you answer, add a counterexample or a boundary where the idea stops working.
entries.value: Imodi enzima kakhudlwana: ngemuva kokuphendula, engeza isibonelo esiphikisayo noma umkhawulo lapho umqondo uyeka khona ukusebenza.

entries.source: Help me learn supply and demand
Help me understand supply and demand
Higher price does not mean demand increased. The tax starts on the supply side by changing seller costs.
entries.value: Intengo ephezulu ayisho ukuthi isidingo sikhulile. Intela iqala ohlangothini lokunikezwa ngokushintsha izindleko zomthengisi.

entries.value: Isakhamuzi esikholekile ngokomlando esixhumene namanethiwekhi ajwayelekile

I am asking for direct explanation. Give a concise explanation, then require me to restate the corrected idea in my own words.
entries.value: Ngicela incazelo eqondile. Nika incazelo emfushane, bese ufuna ukuthi ngiphinde ngisho umbono olungisiwe ngamazwi ami.

entries.source: I can compress the explanation, but I still need one proof of understanding before unlocking the next step.
entries.value: Ngingayifinyeza incazelo, kodwa ngisadinga ubufakazi obubodwa bokuqonda ngaphambi kokuvula isinyathelo esilandelayo.

entries.source: I could not answer right now. Please try again.
entries.value: Angikwazanga ukuphendula njengamanje. Ngicela uzame futhi.

entries.source: I could not build that deck right now. Try a shorter topic or simpler notes.
entries.value: Angikwazanga ukwakha lelo deki njengamanje. Zama isihloko esifushane noma amanothi alula.

entries.source: I could not build that quiz right now. Try a simpler topic or try again.
entries.value: Angikwazanga ukwakha lowo mbuzo njengamanje. Zama isihloko esilula noma uzame futhi.

entries.source: I could not save that card review. Please try again.
entries.value: Angikwazanga ukulondoloza lokho kubuyekezwa kwekhadi. Ngicela uzame futhi.

entries.source: I could not score that answer. Please try again.
entries.value: Angikwazanga ukubeka amaphuzu kuleyo mpendulo. Ngicela uzame futhi.

entries.source: I will keep the lesson active: hint, repair, slow down, or raise the challenge when you ask.
entries.value: Ngizogcina isifundo sisebenza: nika iseluleko, lungisa, yehlisa ijubane, noma wandise inselelo uma ucela.

entries.source: If I am ready, ask me to state the idea in my own words. If not, ask the one question needed before final synthesis.
entries.value: Uma sengikulungele, ngicele ukuba ngisho umqondo ngamazwi ami. Uma kungenjalo, buza umbuzo owodwa odingekayo ngaphambi kwesiphetho sokugcina.

entries.source: If price rises while volume stays steady, revenue can increase. If costs rise faster, free cash flow may still fall.
entries.value: Uma intengo ikhuphuka kanti ivolumu ihlala izinzile, imali engenayo ingakhuphuka. Uma izindleko zikhuphuka ngokushesha, ukuhamba kwemali okukhululekile kungase kwehle.

entries.source: If production costs rise, sellers need a higher price to supply the same quantity, so the supply curve shifts left.
entries.value: Uma izindleko zokukhiqiza zikhuphuka, abathengisi badinga intengo ephezulu ukuze bahlinzeke ngenani elifanayo, ngakho ijika lokuhlinzeka lishintshela kwesobunxele.

entries.source: If you understand a concept, you can give an example, a non-example, and solve a small unfamiliar case.
entries.value: Uma uqonda umqondo, ungakwazi ukunikeza isibonelo, okungesiso isibonelo, futhi uxazulule icala elincane elingajwayelekile.

entries.source: Ignoring slavery, freed status, and patronage would make your assumptions visibly modern.
entries.value: Ukuziba ubugqila, isimo sokukhululeka, kanye nokuvikela kungenza imicabango yakho ibonakale iyeyanamuhla.
